sprints.name: Max-mode autonomous — 59 sprints
commits: 59 sprints / ~83 commits / 10 repos over ~25 hours
8 AUDIT.md files (9-section template) + 8 axe-core CI workflows
DCC Kids Research DB: 8 → 20 rows (Phase-1 complete)
Self-host Inter (× 2) + DM Sans + DM Serif Display + Leaflet + Fuse.js
5 new weekly external-link-check workflows; 100% SEO gap closed on non-DCC
32 retro-filed Notion Product Backlog entries (2 batches × 16, both 100% success)
sprints.summary: Continuous autonomous run invoked by Aaron typing 'next sprint' ~48 times + 'run max all the way until the pro plan is done'. All artefacts pushed. See logs/RETRO.md and hal-stack/context-system/exports/2026-04-21-max-mode-39-sprints.md + 2026-04-22-max-mode-continuation-sprints-48-65.md.

sprints.name: CSP-ready (inline script extraction)
commits: refactor(js): extract inline script to js/app.js (S-KEVIN-CSP-READY pattern)
sprints.summary: 1560-line inline <script> block extracted to js/app.js; replaced with <script src="js/app.js" defer>. node --check clean. Career Coach now has zero inline JS.

sprints.name: Portfolio SEO sweep
commits: feat(seo): add sitemap.xml + robots.txt (× 6 repos)
feat(ci): weekly external-link check (× 5 repos)
fix(seo): align Kevin robots.txt with existing noindex posture
sprints.summary: 7 sitemaps + 6 robots.txt across all non-DCC repos. 5 new weekly link-check workflows. Kevin and Quality Dashboard correctly get Disallow:/ matching their noindex posture. Self-review caught one regression in sprint 62 and fixed it same-session.

sprints.name: Command Centre a11y + JSON schema CI
commits: feat(a11y,ci): :focus-visible + JSON schema validator workflow
sprints.summary: Dark-theme keyboard a11y via explicit :focus-visible. _build/check_data_schemas.py validates data/*.json on every push. All 4 existing data files pass schema check.

sprints.name: LLM Portability Route B (S-CC-PORTABILITY)
commits: feat: wire LLM provider picker (Anthropic / OpenAI / Gemini / Ollama)
sprints.summary: Career Coach now supports 4 LLM providers end-to-end. Parallel to Clarity's earlier S-CLARITY-PORTABILITY. L1 → L3/L4-capable.

sprints.name: Clarity ↔ Career Coach ↔ DCC cross-promotion
commits: feat: Clarity results page shows 'Other free tools' block
feat: Career Coach footer cross-links Clarity + DCC
sprints.summary: Each product becomes the other's top-of-funnel. Bilingual data-en/fr attributes on Career Coach side.

sprints.name: Kids Research Database — Phase 1 coverage
commits: feat: 12 new research rows (8 → 20; Phase-1 target met)
feat: Piaget/Erikson/Vygotsky/Kohlberg primary-source appendices
sprints.summary: 4 ages × 5 categories coverage grid complete; three age-spanning ladders complete (Tech-Safety / Emotional-Safety / AI-literacy). Every row cites a primary publication. Needs Aaron review to advance Research → Spec.

sprints.name: Portfolio audit + a11y baseline (Tier-1 coverage)
commits: feat: AUDIT.md + axe-core CI on 8 repos
feat: AUDIT.md.template in two-birds-project-template
sprints.summary: Every touchable repo (except elite-karate-site, held on client feedback) now has 9-section AUDIT.md + every-push axe-core workflow. 8 ranked top-5 next-action lists. Template ensures future projects start compliant.

sprints.name: Sovereignty hardening (L1 → L3 across repos)
commits: feat: self-host Inter on Kevin + aaron-patzalek
feat: self-host DM Sans + DM Serif Display on Career Coach
feat: self-host Leaflet on Kevin
feat: self-host Fuse.js on Command Centre
sprints.summary: Font + library dependencies moved from CDN → vendored. SIL OFL 1.1 + MIT licences included. Every repo touchable except elite-karate-site now L3-capable on fonts.

sprints.name: AEO Foundation
commits: feat: add JSON-LD structured data for AEO foundation
feat: update robots.txt and sitemap.xml for AI crawler access
feat: rewrite meta descriptions for AEO optimisation
fix: semantic HTML heading hierarchy audit
sprints.summary: Added Organisation, FAQPage, Article, and LocalBusiness JSON-LD schemas to all pages. Explicit AI crawler rules in robots.txt. 16-page meta description rewrite. Fixed 81 heading hierarchy violations across all modules.

sprints.name: Glossary Deep Expansion + Search Intelligence
commits: feat: 200+ glossary entries in EN and FR — master term list
feat: fuzzy search, bilingual toggle, category browse, and analytics
feat: glossary SEO/AEO optimisation with FAQPage schema
sprints.summary: 120+ bilingual terms (EN/FR) across 12 categories. Fuse.js fuzzy search with did-you-mean. Category filter. Search analytics to localStorage + GA. Admin dashboard at ?admin=true. FAQPage JSON-LD with 15 Q&As.
